extract: Calyrex (Japanese: バドレックス Budrex) is a dual-type Psychic/Grass Legendary Pokémon introduced during Generation VIII, in The Crown Tundra. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Calyrex has two forms, which are achieved when it mounts one of two Pokémon using the Reins of Unity. When it mounts Glastrier, it becomes Ice Rider Calyrex and is dual-type Psychic/Ice. When it mounts Spectrier, it becomes Shadow Rider Calyrex and is dual-type Psychic/Ghost. (Refer to Game data→Form data for more details.) Calyrex is the game mascot of The Crown Tundra, appearing on the boxart of the Pokémon Sword and Shield Expansion Pass in its base form. It is the last Pokémon in the Crown Tundra Pokédex.
